title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 13–15, this part follows Unknown person #12, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Loki as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No need to thank me, we have to hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Anywhere but here would be heaven!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I-I had given up on surviving this...

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: Boss! It's rocks and the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on! This probably isn't the time for that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How dare you go after my family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If ya want me dead, I'll take ya down first!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's not much to gain here. YA know.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't sweat it!! I owe you since I'm always drinking on your tab!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, you two!! Check this out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: word ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro ro RO RO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Saint Saturn?! What is this transfer- nation?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good on ya!! At least someone's havin' a fun time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: mind if I ask... what the hell we're up against?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe this is a dream after all!! What's up with this Island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been one adventurous twist after another today!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it had to say... I'd say it's...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
